name: refine-typography-color
expected_output: Improved FeatureCard.jsx with: non-Inter font choice, OKLCH-based colors (no pure #000/#fff), inline styles moved to CSS classes or CSS variables, card simplified (remove one of: border/shadow/background as per redesign rules), semantic class names.

assertions.description: Inline style props removed from JSX in favor of CSS classes
Inter font removed as primary choice
Colors use oklch() or CSS custom properties (design tokens)
Card no longer has all three of border + shadow + white background simultaneously
assertions.reason: The root card still uses a background, solid border, and box-shadow together.
assertions.description_for_judge: Check whether the card has been simplified — it should not have all of: solid border, box-shadow, AND white background together. At least one should be removed or transformed.

notes: Typography and color choices improve, but the component still relies heavily on inline styling and a conventional card treatment.
Better font and color decisions are visible, but they are not translated into a cleaner component architecture.
Fails the no-inline-styles requirement and uses JS hover handlers that mutate inline styles.
OKLCH tokens are present, but the card still combines background, border, and shadow simultaneously.

judge.verdict: Partial improvement only. The style direction is better, but it does not satisfy the refactor and simplification requirements.

assertions.description: Inline style props removed from JSX in favor of CSS classes
Inter font removed as primary choice
Colors use oklch() or CSS custom properties (design tokens)
Card no longer has all three of border + shadow + white background simultaneously
assertions.reason: The root card still combines a white/gradient surface, border, and box-shadow.
assertions.description_for_judge: Check whether the card has been simplified — it should not have all of: solid border, box-shadow, AND white background together. At least one should be removed or transformed.

notes: Still carries glossy gradient card styling and mixed generic font choices.
Some decorative polish, but it remains closer to trend-driven styling than a disciplined refinement.
Inline styles remain throughout and the component architecture is unchanged.
Uses pure white, keeps Inter in the stack, and does not simplify the card treatment.

judge.verdict: Mostly a restyle of the original snippet rather than the requested structural cleanup.
